account-adjust-scope-link: Link to manage OAuth consumer settings on Wikimedia's Meta-Wiki (nice-to-have scope changes).
account-client-id-label: Label before the OAuth client ID value on an application key card; include trailing punctuation for the locale.
account-client-secret-label: Label before the masked OAuth client secret on an application key card; include trailing punctuation for the locale.
account-col-access-token: Table column header for the masked access token value.
account-col-actions: Table column header for row actions (manage link and remove button).
account-col-application: Table column header for OAuth application name.
account-col-consumer-key: Table column header for OAuth client ID (truncated in prototype).
account-col-grants: Table column header for granted permissions summary.
account-col-issued: Table column header for token issue date.
account-col-last-used: Table column header for last token use date.
account-col-never-used: Cell value when a token has never been used.
account-col-registered: Table column header for consumer registration date.
account-col-token-name: Table column header for token display name.
account-copy-secret-aria: Accessible name for the icon button that copies a token to the clipboard.
account-delete-token-button: Destructive quiet Delete button on an API key card. Prototype: click is intentionally idle (no row removal or Meta revoke).
account-developer-tokens-description: Short introductory paragraph for the developer tokens section (what the section is for).
account-developer-tokens-empty: Notice when no personal API key rows are shown.
account-developer-tokens-heading: Section heading for personal API keys on the account page.
account-developer-tokens-help-after: Closing punctuation after the documentation link in the developer tokens learn-more line (e.g. “.”).
account-developer-tokens-help-before: Text before the documentation link, appended after the developer-token guidance paragraph (e.g. “Learn more in ”).
account-developer-tokens-list-label: Accessible name for the personal API keys list (`aria-label` on ul).
account-developer-tokens-table-caption: Accessible caption for the developer tokens table (legacy key).
account-external-link-aria: Accessible label for external links; $1 is the visible link text.
account-hide-secret-aria: Accessible name for the icon button that hides a revealed token.
account-learn-more-about-before: Text before the documentation link in learn-more lines (e.g. “Learn more about ”).
account-learn-more-oauth-link: Linked phrase for OAuth for developers documentation (follows account-learn-more-about-before).
account-learn-more-owner-only-link: Linked phrase for owner-only consumer documentation (follows account-learn-more-about-before).
account-logged-out-description: Body copy on the logged-out `/account` gate (Figma 1001:18723) prompting the user to sign in.
account-logged-out-title: Page title on the logged-out `/account` gate (Figma 1001:18723) — “User dashboard”.
account-meta-grants: Metadata label before the grants summary on an OAuth list item.
account-meta-issued: Metadata label before the issued date on a token list item; include trailing punctuation appropriate for the locale.
account-meta-last-used: Metadata label before the last-used date on a token list item.
account-meta-permissions: Metadata label before permissions summary on a token list item; include trailing punctuation for the locale.
account-meta-registered: Metadata label before the registration date on an OAuth list item.
account-meta-status: Metadata label before approval status on a token list item; include trailing punctuation for the locale.
account-oauth-tokens-description: Short introductory paragraph for the OAuth applications section (what the section is for).
account-oauth-tokens-empty: Notice when no application API key rows are shown.
account-oauth-tokens-heading: Section heading for application OAuth API keys.
account-oauth-tokens-help-after: Closing punctuation after the documentation link in the OAuth learn-more line (e.g. “.”).
account-oauth-tokens-help-before: Text before the documentation link, appended after the OAuth application guidance paragraph (e.g. “Learn more in ”).
account-oauth-tokens-list-label: Accessible name for the application API keys list (`aria-label` on ul).
account-oauth-tokens-table-caption: Accessible caption for the OAuth applications table (legacy key).
account-page-title-after: Text after the username in the account dashboard title (e.g. possessive suffix “’s dashboard” in English).
account-page-title-before: Text before the username in the account dashboard title (empty in English).
account-request-developer-token-guidance: Prose shown below the request link (subtle color); explains Meta-Wiki registration, approval, and revocation for personal tokens. Learn-more links are appended in the same paragraph via help-before/between/after messages.
account-request-developer-token-link: External link label to request a personal developer token on Wikimedia's Meta-Wiki.
account-request-new-token-button: Progressive button label to request a new API key on Meta-Wiki.
account-request-oauth-application-guidan: Prose shown below the request link (subtle color); explains Meta-Wiki registration, approval, and public consumer list. Learn-more links are appended in the same paragraph via help-before/between/after messages.
account-request-oauth-application-link: External link label to propose a new OAuth 2.0 consumer on Wikimedia's Meta-Wiki.
account-reset-dialog-body: Body copy for the Reset API key confirmation dialog (Figma 626:7921). Mentions that reset generates a new secret and refresh token.
account-reset-dialog-cancel: Neutral Cancel button on the Reset API key confirmation dialog.
account-reset-dialog-close: Accessible label for the Reset API key dialog close (X) button.
account-reset-dialog-confirm: Progressive primary Reset button on the Reset API key confirmation dialog.
account-reset-dialog-copied: Brief Codex tooltip shown after clicking a credential copy button in the Reset success dialog.
account-reset-dialog-credentials-list-la: Accessible name for the list of newly generated credentials in the Reset success dialog.
account-reset-dialog-done: Progressive primary Done button on the Reset success dialog (Figma 633:7695).
account-reset-dialog-refresh-token-label: Label for the refresh token row in the Reset success dialog (application API key).
account-reset-dialog-success-intro: Intro copy above the new credentials in the Reset success dialog (Figma 633:7695).
account-reset-dialog-title-application: Title of the Reset confirmation dialog for an application API key.
account-reset-dialog-title-personal: Title of the Reset confirmation dialog for a personal API key.
account-reset-dialog-warning: Warning message below credentials in the Reset success dialog — credentials are shown only once until another reset.
account-reset-token-button: Quiet button label that opens the Reset API key confirmation dialog.
account-resources-nav-label: Accessible name for the documentation links region on the account page.
account-reveal-secret-aria: Accessible name for the icon button that reveals a masked token.
account-row-actions-menu-aria: Accessible name for the icon-only row actions MenuButton (ellipsis).
account-sign-out-button: Destructive button label to end the Meta OAuth session from the account dashboard.
account-token-secret-actions-aria: Accessible name for the grouped reveal and copy controls beside a masked token.
account-write-token-notice: Notice inside an application API key card explaining that the token cannot be used for write requests in the API Explorer.
brand-wordmark-developer-portal: Second line of the compact header wordmark (Developer Portal). Translate; keep similar visual weight to English.
brand-wordmark-wikimedia: Top line of the compact header wordmark (WIKIMEDIA).
color-mode-auto-label: Accessible label for the automatic color scheme option, which follows the operating system preference, in the header color scheme toggle.
color-mode-dark-label: Accessible label for the dark color scheme option in the header color scheme toggle.
color-mode-group-label: Accessible label for the header color scheme toggle group (light/auto/dark).
color-mode-light-label: Accessible label for the light color scheme option in the header color scheme toggle.
content-attribution-adapted-from: Attribution footer lead-in on a content page adapted from a wiki. Followed by the source page title (linked), wiki host, license, and revision.
content-external-link-label: Accessible label for the external-link icon appended to links that go to external sites. Indicates to screen reader users that the link leaves the site.
content-heading-anchor-label: Accessible label for the anchor link icon shown on hover next to each heading in content pages. Reads aloud when keyboard users focus the link.
content-page-nav-label: Accessible name for the prev/next page navigation landmark at the bottom of content pages.
explorer-api-modules-title: Heading for the right-hand API modules navigation panel.
explorer-bootstrap-error: Shown when the aggregated explorer bootstrap request fails for the selected wiki instance.
explorer-browse-api-modules-after: Text after the wiki project name in the browse modules panel title (includes leading space).
explorer-browse-api-modules-before: Text before the wiki project name in the browse modules panel title (includes trailing space).
explorer-debug-empty: Shown when there are no diagnostics events recorded yet.
explorer-description: Short instruction text under the community explorer page heading ("Discover REST APIs…").
explorer-empty-modules: Shown when discovery returns no modules.
explorer-endpoint-fallback: Fallback endpoint label when an operation has no summary in the API modules panel.
explorer-endpoints-empty: Shown when a module spec resolves but contains no operations.
explorer-endpoints-error: Shown when the endpoint list for a module cannot be loaded.
explorer-endpoints-label: Accessible name for the module rail endpoint navigation region (lists operations for the selected REST module).
explorer-endpoints-loading: Shown while the endpoint list for a module is loading.
explorer-enterprise-custom-empty: Empty state shown when the parsed Enterprise spec contains no endpoints at all.
explorer-enterprise-custom-empty-tag: Empty state shown when the selected tag has no endpoints listed under it.
explorer-enterprise-custom-error: Error message label shown when the Enterprise API outline endpoint fails. The technical error reason is appended after this label.
explorer-enterprise-custom-loading: Loading indicator label shown while the Enterprise API outline (tags and endpoints) is being fetched.
explorer-enterprise-custom-tablist-label: Accessible name for the vertical tablist of Enterprise API tags in the custom viewer.
explorer-enterprise-custom-untagged-labe: Display label for the synthetic "untagged" bucket that groups endpoints without an OpenAPI tag.
explorer-failed-modules-label: Prefix label for a warning list of modules that failed spec loading during bootstrap.
explorer-instance-label: Label for the wiki instance selector.
explorer-instance-placeholder: Placeholder text for instance selector with no selected value.
explorer-loading-instance: Heading shown while replacing the explorer interface with an instance bootstrap loading state.
explorer-loading-instance-description: Loading-state text shown before the selected wiki display name while bootstrap is running.
explorer-loading-interface: Shown while the Scalar explorer bundle is loading after the page chrome has rendered.
explorer-loading-modules: Shown while discovery modules are loading.
explorer-module-beta-chip-label: Label on the warning InfoChip when a REST module title includes a beta marker.
explorer-module-description-readinglists: One-line REST API module description for ReadingLists when the OpenAPI spec omits info.description. Paraphrased from Extension:ReadingLists on mediawiki.org.
explorer-module-placeholder: Placeholder text for module selector with no selected value.
explorer-module-rail-collapse-endpoints-: Accessible label for the inline module rail control that collapses the endpoint list (below project controls on narrow viewports).
explorer-module-rail-description: Legacy help text for the former multi-module rail accordion (unused in current single-module endpoint rail).
explorer-module-rail-expand-endpoints-la: Accessible label for the inline module rail control that expands the endpoint list (below project controls on narrow viewports).
explorer-module-rail-title: Legacy heading for the former multi-module rail sidebar (unused; rail heading is the selected module headingTitle).
explorer-module-unavailable: Shown when a module or endpoint is unavailable for the selected wiki project.
explorer-no-selectable-modules: Shown when all discovered modules failed spec loading and none can be selected.
explorer-opt-in-beta-endpoints: Checkbox label for including beta REST endpoints.
explorer-opt-in-internal-endpoints: Checkbox label for including internal REST endpoints.
explorer-opt-in-label: Legend for the Include checkbox group beside the REST API select (beta and internal endpoints).
explorer-opt-in-popover-beta-body: Normal-weight text after the beta label, typically starting with a colon and the description.
explorer-opt-in-popover-beta-label: Bold term at the start of the beta bullet in the opt-in help popover (e.g. "Beta").
explorer-opt-in-popover-internal-body: Normal-weight text after the internal label, typically starting with a colon and the description.
explorer-opt-in-popover-internal-label: Bold term at the start of the internal bullet in the opt-in help popover (e.g. "Internal").
explorer-opt-in-popover-intro: Introductory sentence in the opt-in help popover, before the beta and internal bullet points.
explorer-opt-in-popover-title: Title in the opt-in help popover header ("Opt-in endpoints").
explorer-opt-in-popover-trigger-label: Accessible name for the info button that opens the opt-in endpoints help popover.
explorer-project-commons: Project option in the API explorer project combobox: Wikimedia Commons.
explorer-project-label: Label for the project combobox in the API explorer project controls fieldset.
explorer-project-language-en: Language option in the API explorer language combobox: English.
explorer-project-language-es: Language option in the API explorer language combobox: Spanish.
explorer-project-language-fa: Language option in the API explorer language combobox: Farsi.
explorer-project-language-he: Language option in the API explorer language combobox: Hebrew.
explorer-project-language-label: Label for the language combobox in the API explorer project controls fieldset.
explorer-project-wikidata: Project option in the API explorer project combobox: Wikidata.
explorer-project-wikipedia: Project option in the API explorer project combobox: Wikipedia.
explorer-refresh-button: Button to retry discovery after failure.
explorer-rest-api-module-description: Help text for the REST API select in the explorer project controls; refers to the wiki project chosen above.
explorer-rest-api-module-label: Label for the REST API select in the explorer project controls ("REST API to explore").
explorer-scalar-switching: Desktop-only overlay text while switching Scalar to a newly selected module.
explorer-scalar-write-endpoint-warning: Warning in the Scalar Test Request modal for write HTTP methods (POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH). Shown when the test-wiki checkbox is unchecked. $1 is the production wiki display name for the selected project (for example English Wikipedia). $2 is the test wiki hostname (for example test.wikipedia.org). Render $2 in monospace in the UI.
explorer-scalar-write-test-wiki-toggle-d: Helper text below the test-wiki checkbox in the Scalar Test Request modal. Explains that unchecking the box sends write requests to production.
explorer-scalar-write-test-wiki-toggle-l: Primary label for the test-wiki checkbox in the Scalar Test Request modal for write HTTP methods. $1 is the test wiki hostname (for example test.wikipedia.org). Render the hostname in monospace in the UI.
explorer-selected-module-badge: Badge text displayed next to the module currently loaded into Scalar.
explorer-side-nav-access-policy: Placeholder link for access policy documentation.
explorer-side-nav-additional-apis-title: Section heading for additional API links in the left navigation.
explorer-side-nav-api-explorer-title: Section heading for API Explorer links in the left navigation.
explorer-side-nav-content-pages: Placeholder link for content and pages documentation.
explorer-side-nav-enterprise-apis: Link label for the Enterprise APIs full experience in the left navigation.
explorer-side-nav-enterprise-apis-custom: Link label for the custom (non-Scalar) Enterprise APIs viewer in the left navigation. "Custom" indicates a different presentation than the standard Enterprise API Explorer.
explorer-side-nav-label: Accessible name for the API Explorer left-hand section navigation.
explorer-side-nav-libraries-sdks: Placeholder link for libraries and SDKs documentation.
explorer-side-nav-licensing-attribution: Placeholder link for licensing and attribution documentation.
explorer-side-nav-overview-title: Section heading for overview documentation links in the left navigation.
explorer-side-nav-rate-limits: Placeholder link for rate limits documentation.
explorer-side-nav-stability-policy: Placeholder link for stability policy documentation.
explorer-side-nav-wikimedia-api-modules: Community explorer page H1 and left-nav link label ("Wikimedia APIs").
explorer-spec-missing: Shown when no module spec URL can be resolved.
explorer-title: Heading for the API explorer page.
explorer-wiki-project-help: Help text for the wiki project selector in the API modules panel.
explorer-wiki-project-label: Label for the wiki project selector in the API modules panel.
explorer-wikimedia-project-title: Fieldset title for the Wikimedia project + language controls in the API explorer.
footer-aria-label: Accessible name for the site footer region.
footer-attribution-sentence-created-by: Footer legal attribution — first sentence (who created the site).
footer-attribution-sentence-license-afte: Footer legal attribution — end of license sentence after the CC BY-SA link (includes leading space).
footer-attribution-sentence-license-befo: Footer legal attribution — start of license sentence before the CC BY-SA link (includes trailing space).
footer-attribution-sentence-trademark: Footer legal attribution — trademark sentence (final line).
footer-license-link-label: Footer link label for the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike license.
footer-policy-nav-label: Accessible name for the footer policy links group.
footer-privacy-policy: Footer link label for the Wikimedia Foundation privacy policy.
footer-terms-of-use: Footer link label for the Wikimedia Foundation terms of use.
header-account-label: Header link to the account dashboard when no prototype session username is shown yet.
header-auth-link-aria: Accessible name for the header link when signed in; $1 is the wiki username (link goes to the account dashboard).
header-logged-in-as:
Header text showing the logged-in user. Parameters:
* $1 - the Wikimedia username.
header-login-label: Text for the Log in link in the header. Starts the Wikimedia OAuth login flow.
header-logout-label: Text for the Log out link in the header, shown when a user is logged in.
header-search-button-label: Accessible label for the collapsed header search icon button.
header-search-placeholder: Placeholder text for the header search field prototype.
header-settings-label: Accessible label for the header settings button prototype.
header-utility-menu-label: Accessible label for the collapsed header utility menu button (settings, language, log in).
interface-language-en: Option label for English in the interface language selector.
interface-language-es: Option label for Spanish in the interface language selector.
interface-language-fa: Option label for Persian in the interface language selector.
interface-language-fr: Option label for French in the interface language selector.
interface-language-he: Option label for Hebrew in the interface language selector.
interface-language-label: Label for the interface language selector in the top header.
interface-language-placeholder: Placeholder text for the interface language selector with no selected value.
nav-about: Main navigation item for about page.
nav-api: Main navigation item for explorer page.
nav-community: Main navigation item for the community page.
nav-contribute: Main navigation item for the contribute page.
nav-enterprise: Main navigation item for the enterprise page.
nav-get-help: Main navigation item for the get help page.
nav-get-started: Main navigation item for the get started (home) page.
nav-learn: Main navigation item for the learn page.
nav-primary-label: Accessible name for the primary site navigation region in the left page grid column.
nav-tools-and-bots: Main navigation item for the tools and bots page.
nav-use-content-and-data: Main navigation item for the use content and data page.
nav-utility-label: Accessible name for the utility navigation region in the right page grid column.
nav-wiki-translate: Primary-nav label for the demo page imported from the Help:Extension:Translate wiki page. English placeholder in non-en locales pending translation.
oauth-callback-completing-label: Progress text shown on the OAuth callback page while the login is being completed.
oauth-callback-error-label: Error message shown on the OAuth callback page when the login could not be completed.
search-all-languages-cta: Button label to expand the search view across all supported languages.
search-no-locale-results: Message shown when no results are found for the query in the active locale. $1 is the translated language name; $2 is the user's search query. Use {{bidi:$1}} and {{bidi:$2}} for BiDi isolation.
search-no-results-any-language: Message shown in all-locales mode when no results are found in any language. $1 is the user's search query. Use {{bidi:$1}} for BiDi isolation.
search-results-locale-heading: Heading shown above a group of search results in a specific language. $1 is the translated name of the language (e.g. 'French'). Use {{bidi:$1}} for BiDi isolation.
section-nav-about-label: Accessible name for the About left-hand section navigation.
section-nav-community-communicate-with-t: Placeholder link for communicating with the tech community.
section-nav-community-explore-hackathons: Placeholder link for hackathons and events.

section-nav-community-learn-and-share-te: Placeholder link for learning and sharing technical skills.

section-nav-tools-and-bots-label: Accessible name for the Tools and bots left-hand section navigation (empty prototype).
section-nav-use-content-and-data-label: Accessible name for the Use content and data left-hand section navigation.
